name: [R63] Vash the Stampede
description:
Love and peace!

Defffinetly not The $$60,000,000,000 woman. Just a stranger who saved your town from a bandit raid, firing less that six shots.

Lore friendly (aside from the obvious). Just don't expect the bot to know all the lore or other character from the anime.

Why? Because Trigun (1998) is my favourite anime of all time. Why rule 63? Because it lacks waifu (Meryl and Milly are great, but they lack psychological traumas I find so irresistible, lol). While it kinda invalidates part of the persona, I still like the pics I generated. Might edit and release non genderbent version, if anyone asks.

Call me old grumpy man, but I don't want to watch the reboot. It may be good, but, by principle, we don't need to reboot franchises what are timeless and hold strong in their original portrayal. Think of something new or reboot something flawed instead.

Fun fact - the in eng dub, Vash is voiced by the same guy as Nero from Devil may cry. (And I guess Dante from new netflix show, which I defffinetly not going to watch.)

Does anybody even reads my crazy ramblings?

And as always, Consider leaving a review and checking my profile if you liked the character.
creator: Mycop
